overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a medieval European market square. The player faces a merchant in a red tunic standing behind a wooden counter, with stone buildings and yellow canvas market stalls visible in the background. The scene features high-quality lighting and textures characteristic of modern RPGs like Kingdom Come: Deliverance.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval market square with merchant stalls and wooden carts

events.description: merchant in red tunic stands up from leaning position and begins gesturing with hands
background NPC under dark canopy moves from standing to bending over work table
merchant leans forward again onto the wooden counter

agents.ego_description: standing at the merchant's counter engaged in dialogue or trade interaction

notable_agents.action: merchant in red tunic gesturing and talking behind the wooden counter
worker in beige tunic working under the dark canopy in the background

entered.detail: large market tent with yellow canvas covering and wooden support poles
weathered wooden plank counter with metal railings in foreground
large spoked wooden wagon wheels with metal rims
medieval building with cream plaster walls, small windows, and dark roof tiles
dark green canvas awning extending from building over work area
large black iron pot sitting near the wooden cart

segments.scene_description: The scene depicts a medieval market interaction in a historic town square. The player faces a merchant behind a weathered wooden counter, while a yellow canvas stall stands to the right and a wooden cart with large wheels occupies the left foreground. Stone buildings with small windows line the background. The merchant gestures expressively during the conversation, and a background worker moves under a dark canopy. The camera remains mostly stationary with slight forward drift, capturing the warm sunlight illuminating the cobblestone ground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, intimate interaction within a sun-drenched medieval market square that subtly deepens in perspective. It begins with a close view of a merchant in a red tunic gesturing expressively from behind a weathered wooden counter, framed by a large-wheeled cart and a yellow canvas stall. As the camera maintains a slight forward drift, the warm sunlight on the cobblestones becomes more pronounced, drawing the eye toward the surrounding environment. The scene then expands to reveal the broader town square, where a background worker moves beneath a dark canopy against a backdrop of stone buildings with small windows.
